FIGHTER_POWER_FRAME_ADVANTAGE.title: Frame Advantage
FIGHTER_POWER_FRAME_ADVANTAGE.descriptio:
Positive frames = advantage, spendable.
Negative frames = punishable, take extra counter-hit damage.
FIGHTER_POWER_FIGHTING_SPIRIT.title: Fighting Spirit
FIGHTER_POWER_FIGHTING_SPIRIT.descriptio:
Max 6 stacks.
+1 STR +1 DEX while active.
+1 per turn (outside burnout).
FIGHTER_POWER_COMBO.title: Combo
FIGHTER_POWER_COMBO.description:
Max 1 stack.
Enables bonus effects on [gold]Combo[/gold] cards.
FIGHTER_POWER_COMBO.smartDescription: Combo active. Enables combo bonus effects.
FIGHTER_POWER_SUPER_GAUGE.title: Super Gauge
FIGHTER_POWER_SUPER_GAUGE.description:
Max 3 bars.
Every 3 attacks grant 1 bar.
Super cards can consume gauge for enhanced effects.
FIGHTER_POWER_STRIKE_THROW_MIXUP.title: Strike-Throw Mixup
FIGHTER_POWER_STRIKE_THROW_MIXUP.descrip:
Attacks ignore Block.
Throw frame cost -3.
FIGHTER_POWER_TIPSY.title: Tipsy
FIGHTER_POWER_TIPSY.description:
Max 4 stacks.
Enhances the effectiveness of drunken fist cards.
FIGHTER_POWER_DEVILS_SONG_POWER.title: Devil's Song
FIGHTER_POWER_DEVILS_SONG_POWER.descript:
Tipsy is treated as 4 (max).
Each attack gains 1 frame.
FIGHTER_POWER_DEVILS_SONG_POWER.smartDes: {Amount} turn(s) remaining. Tipsy treated as max.
